channel.title: Adiutor Update
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.
channel.item:
Version 1.4.0 https://sourodeepsarkar.github.io/adiutor-help/ 1.4.0

What's New in v1.4.0

✨ Changes & Improvements

  • Distraction blocking, now built into Adiutor: Enter deeper focus sessions by blocking distracting apps for up to 3 hours at a stretch. Choose exactly what to block, start instantly, and stay in control with the option to end sessions early whenever needed.
  • A more intentional focus workflow: App blocking is designed to work alongside Focus Mode, helping you reduce context switching and maintain uninterrupted study momentum.
  • Refinements across the experience: Includes stability improvements, UI polish, and under-the-hood enhancements for a smoother and more reliable workflow.

‼️ Reliability & Stability Update

  • Recommended for all users: This update includes important reliability improvements, workflow refinements, and stability enhancements across Adiutor to deliver a smoother, more dependable study experience. Updating is recommended to ensure the best overall performance and compatibility.

Feedback

Feedback, bug reports, and suggestions are welcome through GitHub Issues.

Thank you for trying Adiutor.

Sat, 30 May 2026 20:01:00 +0530
